case_title: YEE, MARILYN vs. FOUCH, DALE LEE et al

docket_entries.description: #5 JDG WICK. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A STIP FOR JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND READ INTO THE RECORD IN FAVOR OF PLTF. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY PLTF MAY SEEK TO HAVE JUDGMENT EXECUTED UPON BEFORE THE 6/30/93 DATE.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT FOUCH, DALE LEE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, MARILYN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-09-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
